description_long: This is an adult woman with a medium build, standing upright and facing forward. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted crop top and high-waisted, loose-fitting jeans with visible rips on the knees, giving her a casual, urban appearance. Her hair is styled in a low bun at the back of her head, and she wears a wristband on her right wrist. The jeans have pockets and belt loops, and the crop top has wide shoulder straps. She is wearing flat shoes, and her overall look is relaxed and modern, suitable for a city street or park environment. No additional accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands upright in a crop top and ripped jeans, with her hair in a low bun and wearing flat shoes.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the crop top, jeans, and low bun hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the crop top, jeans, and arm posture.
description_view_2: Front view showing facial features, crop top, ripped jeans, and wristband.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side profile, arm, and leg details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless crop top and loose ripped jeans
